# ANTHONY. — Digital Infrastructure for Service Businesses

> ANTHONY. builds custom websites, The Vault CRM, managed hosting, and local SEO systems for service businesses across the Mohawk Valley (315), Capital Region (518), and Central New York. Engineered in Rome, NY by founder Anthony Jones.

## What We Do

ANTHONY. is a B2B digital infrastructure company that designs, builds, and manages high-performance websites and marketing systems for local service businesses — contractors, HVAC, plumbing, electrical, roofing, landscaping, healthcare, legal, and more.

## Core Services

- **Custom Web Design**: Bespoke Next.js websites, mobile-first, SEO-optimized, Lighthouse-tuned. You own the source code — no lock-in.
- **The Vault CRM**: Client workspace with lead tracking, pipeline management, client portal, and marketing automations.
- **Managed Hosting**: Cloudflare-powered hosting with security, uptime monitoring, and performance optimization.
- **Local SEO**: Google Business Profile alignment, schema markup, citation building, and local keyword strategy.
- **Website Rescues**: Rescue and rebuild slow, outdated, or broken websites into modern high-performers.
- **Google Business Profile Program**: Full local marketing program per location.

## Pricing

- **Simple Site**: From $1,500 — single-service landing pages and brochure sites.
- **Standard Rebuild**: 3 payments of $1,650 (typical total $3,500–$5,500) — full custom 5–10 page site with local SEO, plus 3 months free hosting and SEO.
- **Enterprise**: From $7,500 — multi-location, CRM integrations, advanced SEO.
- **Growth Plan**: Monthly hosting + security + local SEO + Vault CRM access after launch.

## Micro-SaaS Tools (designedbyanthony.online)

Purpose-built tools for local service businesses, available as standalone subscriptions:

1. **SiteScan** ($19–$79/mo) — Automated website health reports: speed, SEO, accessibility scores.
2. **ReviewPilot** ($19–$79/mo) — AI-powered review response and reputation management.
3. **ClientHub** ($29–$99/mo) — Client portal with project tracking and file sharing.
4. **LocalRank** ($19–$79/mo) — Local SEO dashboard with keyword tracking and citation monitoring.
5. **TestiFlow** ($19–$79/mo) — Automated testimonial collection and social proof widgets.
6. **ContentMill** ($19–$79/mo) — AI content generation for social media and blog posts.
7. **Construction Calculator** ($29/mo) — Material and labor cost estimator for contractors.
8. **Contact Form Builder** ($49/mo) — No-code form builder with spam protection and CRM export.
9. **Website Speed Test** ($29/mo) — Weekly Core Web Vitals monitoring with regression alerts.
10. **Local SEO Checker** ($49/mo) — Google Business Profile audit with scored action items.
11. **Follow-Up Email Writer** ($79/mo) — AI-personalized follow-up sequences for outreach.
12. **Service Area Map** ($29/mo) — Embeddable maps showing service coverage areas.
13. **Website Speed Grader** ($49/mo) — Batch Lighthouse scans for up to five pages at once.

## Founder All-Access Value Proposition

Founding partners get bundled access: custom website + 3 months free hosting/SEO + Vault CRM + priority support. After launch, the optional Growth Plan combines hosting, security, local SEO, and full Vault Suite for one monthly fee. All source code is handed over — no vendor lock-in.
